pages.text: Industry has 6 core tiers. Item IDs and book names match exactly: kubejs:industry_core_t1, kubejs:industry_core_t2, etc.

$(li)$(item)kubejs:industry_core_t1$() gates: immersiveengineering:cokebrick, immersiveengineering:blastbrick, immersiveengineering:workbench, immersiveengineering:conveyor_basic
$(li)$(item)kubejs:industry_core_t2$() gates: immersiveengineering:assembler, immersiveengineering:cloche, industrialforegoing:machine_frame_pity
$(li)$(item)kubejs:industry_core_t3$() gates: industrialforegoing:machine_frame_simple, industrialforegoing:plant_sower, industrialforegoing:plant_gatherer
$(li)$(item)kubejs:industry_core_t4$() gates: industrialforegoing:machine_frame_advanced, industrialforegoing:dissolution_chamber, immersiveengineering:generator
$(li)$(item)kubejs:industry_core_t5$() gates: industrialforegoing:laser_drill, industrialforegoing:ore_laser_base, immersiveengineering:drill
